mapper.select: SELECT fr.id, fr.order_id as "orderId", fr.order_number as "orderNumber", fr.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", dc.customer_email as "customerEmail", fr.seller_id as "sellerId", ds.seller_name as "sellerName", fr.product_id as "productId", dp.product_name as "productName", dp.sku as "productSku", dp.brand as "productBrand", fr.reason, fr.return_type as "returnType", fr.total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", fr.restocking_fee as "restockingFee", fr.description, fr.reviewer_id as "reviewerId", fr.review_notes as "reviewNotes", fr.rejection_reason as "rejectionReason", fr.warehouse_id as "warehouseId", fr.condition_on_receipt as "conditionOnReceipt", fr.inspector_id as "inspectorId", fr.inspector_notes as "inspectorNotes", fr.order_total_value as "orderTotalValue", fr.order_delivery_date as "orderDeliveryDate", fr.state_id as "stateId", fr.flow_id as "flowId", fr.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_returns fr LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fr.customer_id = dc.customer_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_seller ds ON fr.seller_id = ds.seller_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_product dp ON fr.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE fr.id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.fact_returns GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_returns WHERE state_id IN ('REQUESTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'ITEM_RECEIVED', 'INSPECTED')

SELECT fr.id, fr.order_id as "orderId", fr.order_number as "orderNumber", fr.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", fr.product_id as "productId", dp.product_name as "productName", fr.reason, fr.return_type as "returnType", fr.total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", fr.state_id as "stateId", fr.flow_id as "flowId", fr.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_returns fr LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fr.customer_id = dc.customer_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_product dp ON fr.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE fr.state_id IN ('REQUESTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW', 'ITEM_RECEIVED', 'INSPECTED') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_returns WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT fr.id, fr.order_id as "orderId", fr.order_number as "orderNumber", fr.customer_id as "customerId", fr.product_id as "productId", dp.product_name as "productName", fr.reason, fr.return_type as "returnType", fr.total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", fr.state_id as "stateId", fr.flow_id as "flowId", fr.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_returns fr LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_product dp ON fr.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE fr.customer_id = #{customerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.fact_returns WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT fr.id, fr.order_id as "orderId", fr.order_number as "orderNumber", fr.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", fr.seller_id as "sellerId", ds.seller_name as "sellerName", fr.product_id as "productId", dp.product_name as "productName", dp.sku as "productSku", fr.reason, fr.return_type as "returnType", fr.total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", fr.state_id as "stateId", fr.flow_id as "flowId", fr.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_returns fr LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fr.customer_id = dc.customer_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_seller ds ON fr.seller_id = ds.seller_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_product dp ON fr.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE fr.order_id = #{orderId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT fr.id, fr.order_id as "orderId", fr.order_number as "orderNumber", fr.customer_id as "customerId", dc.customer_name as "customerName", fr.product_id as "productId", dp.product_name as "productName", dp.sku as "productSku", fr.reason, fr.return_type as "returnType", fr.total_refund_amount as "totalRefundAmount", fr.state_id as "stateId", fr.flow_id as "flowId", fr.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_returns fr LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_customer dc ON fr.customer_id = dc.customer_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_product dp ON fr.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE fr.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND fr.state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
